notes: Forcing Proton is the only way to use the Custom Music feature on Linux. Works as expected. If you want to point to your home folder, it's Z:/home/(username) to find your music files. Distance accepts MP3, WAV and AIFF.
title: Distance

notes: Running this in Proton is the only way to get VR working. Everything works perfectly with my Vive.
title: Distance

notes: Game works native on Linux (OpenGL). On Proton it works out of the box with DXVK (D3D11 to Vulkan translation). Tested with RADV and the new Mesa ACO compiler on Plasma.
title: Distance
